english: *sér-mo máṅ-po ma kyód-da* (*ser mo mang po ma khyod da*) W. did you not feel very cold on your way? bser-mai nad (bser mai nad) resp. a catarrh, a cold Dzl.

gen. lam-bsél (lam bsel) convoy, safe-conduct, escort; Lex.: jag-skyób-kyi skyél-ma (jag skyob kyi skyel ma) (escort) against robbers; bsél-pa (bsel pa) safeguard, guide, (lam-) bsél byéd-pa ((lam ) bsel byed pa) to accompany and protect on the way, to escort.

alms, gifts presented to clerical persons, bsod-snyóms-yyis tso-ba (bsod snyoms gyis 'tsho ba) to live on alms, on charity, bsod-snyóms byéd-pa (bsod snyoms byed pa), sóg-pa (sog pa), slóṅ-pa (slong pa) Cs., bsod-snyóms-la rgyú-ba (bsod snyoms la rgyu ba), resp. gśègs-pa (gshegs pa) to beg, ask, collect alms; bsod-snyóms sbyór-ba (bsod snyoms sbyor ba) to prepare an entertainment for the priesthood.

1. vb., to be pleased with, to take a delight in, to like, W.: *de-la kon-coy sod-ce man* (*de la dkon mchog sod ce man*) God is not pleased with that. -- 2. adj., pleasing, agreeable. *nyin sod tsor dug* (*nyin sod tsor dug*) W. I feel well, I am quite happy; bsód-pa daṅ ṅán-pa (bsod pa dang ngan pa) good and bad; bsód-pai zas (bsod pai zas) is explained by one Lex.: zas bzáṅ-poi miṅ (zas bzang poi ming) good food, good provisions, by another: = प्रणीत prepared, dressed, boiled. -- bsód-bde (bsod bde), bsód-nams (bsod nams), resp. sku-bsód (sku bsod) 1. good fortune, happiness, felicity, bsód-bde-ċan (bsod bde can) happy, bsód-bde-med (bsod bde med) unhappy Cs. 2. destiny, fate, = dbaṅ-t'áṅ (dbang thang), *t'am-ċád sód-de-ne juṅ* (*tham cad sod de ne jung*) every thing happens according to a decree of fate W.: prob. also sku-bsód śin-tu c'e (sku bsod shin tu che) Ld.-Glr. 11, b. Schl., his destiny is a very high one; kyód-kyi bsód-bde-la brdúṅ-ba yód-pa yin (khyod kyi bsod bde la brdung ba yod pa yin) it belongs to your destiny that you get a drubbing. -- 3. merit, virtue, good action, byéd-pa (byed pa) to perform (a good action) Dzl., bsód-bde sóg-pa (bsod bde sog pa) to gather merit, bsód-nams ma yín-pai las (bsod nams ma yin pai las) sinful deed Thgy.
indemnification, damages paid for bodily injury.
v. sróṅ-ba (srong ba); bsráṅ-po (bsrang po) straight, upright, *yór-po dug sráṅ-po-la žog* (*yor po dug srang po la zhog*) C. it stands aslant, put it straight!

v. srab (srab), to bridle, keep under, restrain, check, curb, refrain, bag-čágs (bag chags) the passions, mún-pa (mun pa) or sgríb-pa (sgrib pa) bsráb-pa (bsrab pa) Cs. to dispel darkness (prob. only in a spiritual sense)

tibetan: བསྲུན་པ་, བསྲུབ་པ་, བསྲུལ་བ་, བསྲེ་བ་, བསྲེག་པ་, བསྲེལ་བ་, བསྲོ་བ་
jaeschke: bsrún-pa, bsrúb-pa, bsrúl-ba, bsré-ba, bsrég-pa, bsrél-ba, bsró-ba
wylie: bsrun pa, bsrub pa, bsrul ba, bsre ba, bsreg pa, bsrel ba, bsro ba
english: v. srún-pa (srun pa), srúb-pa (srub pa) etc.
= sró-ba (sro ba), to dry, by exposing to the rays of the sun Sch.

wylie: bsla ba, bslad pa, bslan pa
english: v. slá-ba (sla ba), slán-ba (slan ba) etc.

1. vb., v. slób-pa (slob pa). -- 2. sbst. doctrine, bsláb-pa gsum (bslab pa gsum) Glr., acc. to an explanation in the Triglot: lhág-pai tsul-krims (lhag pai tshul khrims), lhág-pai sems (lhag pai sems), lhág-pai śes-ráb (lhag pai shes rab) (expressions which I am not able to interpret satisfactorily); our Lama explained bsláb-pa gsúm-gyi sdóm-pa (bslab pa gsum gyi sdom pa) Mil. by: so-t'ar (so thar), byaṅ-séms (byang sems) and gsaṅ-sṅágs-kyi sdóm-pa (gsang sngags kyi sdom pa); bsláb-pai gnas (bslab pai gnas) dogma, tenet Tar. -- *lab-k'an* (*lab mkhan*) W. teacher. -- *lab-(s)tán táṅ-c'e* (*lab stan tang che*) W. to teach, to keep school. -- bslab-bya (bslab bya) what is to be learned, doctrine, precept, admonition, jig-rten mi-čos-la dgos-pai bsláb-bya mdżád-do ('jig rten mi chos la dgos pai bslab bya mdzad do) he imparted to her some practical doctrines or rules of life and social intercourse Glr., bsláb-bya stón-pa (bslab bya ston pa) B, *tán-c'e* (*tang che*) W. to give admonitions, to exhort, reprimand.

wylie: bslu ba, bsle ba, bsleb pa, bslog pa
english: v. slu-ba (slu ba), sle-ba (sle ba) etc.
